user_reviews: [{"Name":"Patrick Zajac","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvvMWZZugnr2rGpPS4iqLIg8HnjMeZtqq9FqHXjIXIVq8TPcz_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Pizza flavor wise was great, but I wish the crust on bottom was crispy. It was in the oven for quite some time so I don’t know why the crust was still soft. But first I tried the Vodka Chicken which was loaded with chicken and the breading was a nice touch, vodka sauce was rich and delish. I also tried the rainbow slice which was the one with tomato, vodka, and pesto, and this one was fiiiiiiire. So many flavors all at once I loved it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCdCtv9FI8MDlbLd5i-oqgM\u0026fid=0x0:0x3084fd7d5497f550"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"Kian Mahini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1oui-oc1cr916qIHQdlJFIB8c4FDF2dj1xRu1V_SaGfzn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The pizza was average (but still good). I’m giving this place 5 stars though because they were open during a blizzard. Servicing locals, stranded tourists and snow workers. Gave a good tip. For that, 5 stars.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAvGFgWNsRubJl3LSppyLr2\u0026fid=0x0:0x3084fd7d5497f550"],"When":"2026-2-23"},{"Name":"Kurt Wallach","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKcartZJche68Flmx5045clh7DaB5NsAomjsiFBUJhfsRYi1g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Simple decent NYC slices. Ordered 1 cheese and 1 pepperoni. Was able to enjoy both slices at the counter top closest to the sidewalk. Enjoyed both. Service at counter was prompt. This is the location on 6th Ave between 28th and 29th streets.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCzfOCwEy-TienqvUPj2Fon\u0026fid=0x0:0x3084fd7d5497f550"],"When":"2026-1-18"},{"Name":"Daniel D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_9N093MtCYq9WGj2PBmU58biQHFjX3MQLw0gAjVM2dFwRqyI8gQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely delicious true floppy NY pizza.  Perfect thin balance, equal thirds crust, sauce and cheese.  Order just simply cheese.  If you can, wait as long as needed for a fresh cheese pie to come out of the oven. 100% worth the wait!!!!! A++","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCwqSisPD9YzPb77V8X8I-Y\u0026fid=0x0:0x3084fd7d5497f550"],"When":"2025-12-15"},{"Name":"wendy wille","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1I0sO8YiDxd3pInK3tPImht_tV3v129bHm3DhBT9VNXWfs-Oz=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very clean, quiet at 1130 . Service was great they were so nice . Food looks delicious, smells and tastes as it looks!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDhJgm5v4FThlV2G9kPIIDW\u0026fid=0x0:0x3084fd7d5497f550"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"O V H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdpOcaajlTQbm1QmGivDcQT35KYRwNCPhdLuvqzLF8DupXHRA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Surprisingly good pizza 🍕!  The sauce was good!  The crust is thin! And I always prefer a fountain coke over those disgusting canned drinks!  Lots of pizzas to choose from. The mushroom slice was excellent and they rarely are.  The place is small but comfortable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDnjJvXgAE\u0026fid=0x0:0x3084fd7d5497f550"],"When":"2024-10-3"},{"Name":"Cheri van Staden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIflb-QNv9gYQ4NhAUrF9lJLqvOaVZuUajM5lPYNkyL6AyGmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The pizza was AWESOME - So good we ate there twice!\nThe Chefs are wonderful + great to chat to. The pizza on both occasions was excellent - crispy + chewy base, delicious cheese, loads of toppings. All round great!\nSmall seating area which is comfy + you can see the kitchen making the pizzas! Cold beers in the fridge which was also great!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICr1-LOhgE\u0026fid=0x0:0x3084fd7d5497f550"],"When":"2024-7-12"},{"Name":"Bert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXP7tn7wiOicVRPy7HeEfgnJ6mR5ku5v_EDP8PB20I71_Va6Zk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this place!  We were in town for a weekend visiting family, and all that entails: Shopping, shows, sightseeing, cocktails and long days.  It was around 1:30 in the morning and I hadn't had a good slice of pizza yet; pizza sounds awesome at 1:30 AM!  My friend told us this place in her neighborhood had good pizza and she was spot on !!!  The guys working were super nice and the slices were awesome.  There were 8 of us rolling in at that time of night and they just got to it, super fast friendly service. Not gonna lie, I had two slices.  Will definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICF1aOB1gE\u0026fid=0x0:0x3084fd7d5497f550"],"When":"2023-10-30"}]

[{"Name":"mike harris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUBn7qJ87GelEAPvs6pp9XOW6caQIijYk2xFiv_JTUxiU3z7JN9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"New york pizza! So good. Pepperoni Pesto, Chicken Bacon ranch Slices and 4 garlic knots. Such a great meal. Very reasonably priced. Very friendly. Great food! Will go back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCKTq9RvwCvYa4gFCBYyXYy&fid=0x0:0x1f273360743e9549"],"When":"2026-2-28"},{"Name":"Vanessa Le","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItngwqm0xjSjP9W2NUqOhaRVQR2ra8phCK4_ZK1020fA3Y0A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"the pizza was fine but good god, the garlic knots. For $4 you get 4 massive garlic knots with a crispy buttery exterior, and the soft pillowy interior of a cinnamon roll. These were genuinely the best garlic knots ive ever had in my life. I don't even like garlic knots or go out of my way to order them, but i saw these beautiful gorgeous babies glistening, SHIMMERING in the glass case and i knew we had to get some. 10/10","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCbKwg3v3jEihrH0auSsED5&fid=0x0:0x1f273360743e9549"],"When":"2026-1-20"},{"Name":"Elisaa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6eo-Q5RGVRLUz7RQMe1SbMzXgeriHaVOVTaBiHakuYqkpDF4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An amazing place for a slice. It’s very tasty with a lot of choice. The quantity and the price are very good. Be careful, the restaurant is not very confortable but you can take out and eat it in front of Times Square.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAeMCb7B6dmlFaqP2D7qA4Q&fid=0x0:0x1f273360743e9549"],"When":"2026-1-11"},{"Name":"kai email","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSCgzcqsWFJosYMye-muvBQfWG8hyFGdnsAdVkpJcZMPwlmD8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've tried quite a few pizza places over the week we've been here (visiting from the UK) and this place is one of the best.

The pizza is super tasty, sauce is good and generous amount of topping. We were served very quickly, no queue and it was a pleasant experience overall!

The garlic knots really are the star of the show though, those little golden balls look like they have a spotlight on them when you walk in and I felt like they were talking to me. 4 massive balls (pause) for 4 dollars is enough to feed two people, and I wouldn't hesitate to say they're the best knots I've ever had!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIR9IAsQnfSbbpziT3GcIHLYTm_n0LhFV9sVcVSF8l6k-3xoA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Dropped in for a slice to take back to my hotel.  Place is tiny--no real "atmosphere".  Pizza is great--got the pepperoni which is the good kind!  Price a bit on the high side for NYC, but the quality is worth it.  Sauce, like another reviewer said, is a bit on the sweet side.  I liked it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Albert “No Onions” Ruggiero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlUtFSWmRV5GuO7IAaqh5n0xEeLyNXW9J4eTgwYuwk-vLzV0wC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I really liked this pizza. The sauce is kind of sweet, giving it a very unique taste. I thoroughly enjoyed both the giant slice and the Sicilian. My biggest complaint is that the price to add one topping is practically the same price as a slice itself. It’s $3-$4+ to add some pepperoni when the slice itself is only $5. If you enjoy just cheese pizza, then I’d recommend this place. Unfortunately, I always want at least one topping.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDPnpWa3wE&fid=0x0:0x1f273360743e9549"],"When":"2024-12-2"},{"Name":"Sameet Sapra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWWgDbB4Q8fLt1op-jV-1XFn2wi7QN2Xk8F2tdKmAJx8cM2F_e4dA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Pretty good vegan pizza. I also got a slice of hot honey pepperoni pizza - the pepperoni and Sicilian style focaccia like crust was excellent, the cheese was very mediocre.

I honestly liked the vegan cheese more than just the normal regular cheese.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDInqXWXA&fid=0x0:0x1f273360743e9549"],"When":"2025-4-10"},{"Name":"M L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIj-Dv99cabPGxuGArhFio0GHLMVj8cDEQNT4-fHahDe5yLRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was a two minute walk from our hotel.  They had a vegan option so I was anxious to try it.  I got fresh jalapenos added to it.  It was amazing!  I ordered a small and it was a pretty good sized pizza.  Definitely recommend it!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Joshua Cornwell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUz2LcG4GAI2gGDk0r7wA1KuQMRnjYgq6AtCsApbEPdBM1zA0x0lA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really great little slice. We got a pepperoni with cherry peppers(phenomenal, sweet, pickled, nice spicey kick), and black olives. Crust, the crust was cooked to perfection with the right amount of char for a brick and charcoal oven. Our waiter Chris M was fantastic, fast and accommodating, had our water out within seconds, and grabbed me some parmesean with a smile on his face. The atmosphere was dimly lit(a plus) and had photos of famous people headshots adorning the walls. The tables were well weathered, with names of years worth of patrons lovingly carved into the top. What a great little spot.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDK44LYO0TkoPMIueus78XS\u0026fid=0x0:0x41ca6e3a2f6d4e74"],"When":"2026-3-8"},{"Name":"Tanner Leavitt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5VJ5serALaH_REbUKz1cJMkgNQYDVP6G6w3iHiKoY-peObAhQJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved this place! The service was great! That coal fired oven and years of experience add up to some incredible pizza! Loved the whole place. We got the john's original on half and added kalamata olives to the other side. There was a line to get in, but it moved quickly and was worth the short wait!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDvZ6fo5-Wh5VQlVFuwtdhC\u0026fid=0x0:0x41ca6e3a2f6d4e74"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"pan s","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVupxU76RsSNldhoBaZQ5VAMgh1mN5p_-Tnp6bUSx_1K2U3qSrJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very friendly staffs and the store vibe feels very cool for tourist like me! I had so much fun looking at photos on the wall, it was like seeing history! Pizza did not disappoint! I normally prefer simple cheese pizza but here, pepperoni was superior! The hint of spice in the pepperoni paired so well with the simple base. Definitely worth the visit if u like pizza.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhASEcAGFWAQdQh0cuO7VbZE\u0026fid=0x0:0x41ca6e3a2f6d4e74"],"When":"2026-2-15"},{"Name":"Robyn Lewis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJp8VwEhscILxp0YGXgEToAOaqIDnh3PoUFdUt4Oam61P1x6g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really good garlic bread, some of the best!  The cheese sticks are ok, average but the dip is delicious and the pizza is sol good.  I think my favourite in new york.  Their reputation is well deserved.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBs8Bjn_oWWBkAWrWzj3BGl\u0026fid=0x0:0x41ca6e3a2f6d4e74"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"Michael","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW8RUY0gmMvW2aNoRNgVoGnics4oc1pnYkos_shm17ElBs1tb8z=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"we came for a slice of authentic nyc pizza, that odd ball “one bite you know the rules” guy rated this place highly, so it was on our list. waited outside in the cold for 30 minutes, once we got inside and so I just have small and tightly packed the places we understood why. No complaints, pizza was great, seeing the guys in the kitchen, hustling pizzas out, and watching their system was entertaining and impressive. Would go back, can see why it’s popular. Definitely helped make our nyc experience with the kids compete","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDI8ulO859mSYom4MZ3bUQ7\u0026fid=0x0:0x41ca6e3a2f6d4e74"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Brenda Miller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5tQniccZbkYiUWPL7WScJmmZcCiWxpnwYyX85t9fYX3SPLLXa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"John's of Bleecker Street absolutely lives up to its reputation. The pizza is classic, no-nonsense, and incredibly satisfying—thin crust with just the right balance of crisp and chew. The sauce is bright and flavorful, tasting fresh and well-seasoned without overpowering the pie, and the cheese melts perfectly into every slice.\n\nWhat really stands out is the consistency and simplicity. There’s nothing flashy here, just expertly made pizza that shows why this place has been an institution for so long. It’s the kind of spot you leave already thinking about when you’ll come back for another slice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCDlkhqVGQtZlk7BBPxRz0q\u0026fid=0x0:0x41ca6e3a2f6d4e74"],"When":"2025-12-20"},{"Name":"James, Food Critic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVsis0H5gMAzGwlhEkdo5Odz0nflrz0_IenxP9xmalYNCR2Smc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This NY style pizza was delicious, but a little bit on the pricier side. There was a line that we had to wait in outside, but it moved fairly quickly and they were able to accommodate us after 10-15 minutes. I highly recommend their classic cheese pizza. The kiddos loved it! Their atmosphere was cheery and friendly and our waiter was very kind. Bring cash if you go, as there is a 4% cash discount.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDdxWw1ZUw9L9pUMunmsttD\u0026fid=0x0:0x41ca6e3a2f6d4e74"],"When":"2025-12-23"},{"Name":"Sagar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVL2NkfvIUSYkeySoYsBTg2N4qVi_QvxK_OqnyLAd5t5uXBZug=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"After 30 minutes shivering outside in the cold, I got seated in. Ordered the Johns Original. The pizza was ok. Not the best I have had but I would love to try the Sasso next time or maybe a pizza with some toppings. They refused to reheat the pizza even though I told them it was ok to microwave the remaining slices if they don't want to put them back in oven but I had no option but to eat it like that. Atmosphere was awesome and it was super crowded. Didn't have to wait inside much for my order. Overall experience was ok.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDxDZ1WL7rdAYucv7O8rCZl\u0026fid=0x0:0x41ca6e3a2f6d4e74"],"When":"2026-1-19"}]

[{"Name":"Aidan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJ0IyAqYnyNe1JywPuye-zqoDUKFYgn371ZBX6aux-Hcd0dtLu=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best pizzas in the city. We didn’t plan on eating here originally. Since Mama Too’s line was so long, we settled here. We did not regret it. The crust was so crispy and the sauce and cheese were the best. It was so good that I visited again on a separate trip. (The pictures are from two different visits)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAaFu_KOQMau4Cg10AG2UvY&fid=0x0:0xad63a7908a34c8ef"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"RJ A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIQcuCEdOxX9TF616fng18iwTIYS-VO17M5jOjBWYtTqcMkbA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Was told about this place several times , finally made it and glad I did.  Went before lunch. Walked up and ordered a slice of pizza and was impressed. It had great flavor, the perfect balance of sauce, cheese and seasoning.   The crust had mild crispness to it and great texture and flavor.  Found my favorite New York style pizza. I can't wait to try the other selections.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD-Ct4-IFzJBBMxquHHMnoY&fid=0x0:0xad63a7908a34c8ef"],"When":"2026-1-14"},{"Name":"Viggy Vanchi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUelmhXTl9JmJFbiiUVctIqhxA9eNaigNGPajEMr_5LzSlkRfZzHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Some of the best pizza I've had in New York. Much better than overrated tourist spots (eyeing you, Joe's). The crust was more robust without compromising on any of other other facets of a classic NY slice. Highly recommend getting a drizzle of hot honey on your slice.

They're open SUPER late, until 4:30am, if I remember correctly. They also have ample seating and a restroom. Seems like a recipe for the perfect final destination after a night-out.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCdcLXbcunrJB-ArjCvR8Fb&fid=0x0:0xad63a7908a34c8ef"],"When":"2026-2-6"},{"Name":"Anthony Jones","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgEZIrXjzx9v3na5dX3vunYyF3BGFGcFh0lW5N6S5fBXfrW-48=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everyone’s going to have their subjective opinion and that’s fair. For us, we managed to get some pizza and get a seat and really just enjoy our first slice of pizza anywhere in nyc. The guy right before us was given the wrong pizza but the team was very willing to work with him and was considerate and efficient all things considered. No business is perfect, especially when trying to meet the demands of both regulars and tourists. As for the pizza, the crust, sauce, cheese, quality, and quantity was perfect. Price was fair. Fairly impressed by the spot and inspired to imitate in my own kitchen.
Overall glowingly positive experience and hope to be back in for maybe even a whole pie. Happy holidays

Edit: Tempted to hit the C train down right now in the cold haha. I’ll be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhANm9MBi4t59AbVcr7z3xy5&fid=0x0:0xad63a7908a34c8ef"],"When":"2025-12-20"},{"Name":"Jatinder Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWh2zCCrrStHo6y32SU9hGxcyFJgc2tjKDHCK7KBs0nfgcQws8_ww=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience at Bleecker Street Pizza. The thin-crust pizzas are crispy, flavorful, and perfectly cooked. Loved the relaxed ambience with comfortable seating, making it a nice place to sit, eat, and enjoy classic New York pizza.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD4nBop5qT45St-CAWsrUJc&fid=0x0:0xad63a7908a34c8ef"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"Barbara Gulten","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_GvCD6E5T9HcViTxOX5vZftm0vslp6usz9eXjcrW_pT_pABc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Best late night snack! And this is a great spot for it. I admit that I was skeptical and didn’t think I would eat a whole slice. Ended up eating a slice and a half. We could have eaten a whole pizza. Great crust!! toppings simple and tasty. Long lines but it moves fast. Lot of people grab and go. They are making the pizzas fresh. Very tasty, very NYC, pop in and get two or 3 slices!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDC-0M_aLWllm4KXfKHuCAA&fid=0x0:0xad63a7908a34c8ef"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"Steve Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUo91IjS2pRcSn2aK1tq1epXv9TNzNMj0dfIY6uLYe1JKpE4q6s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were told this is one of the places to have authentic NYC pizza.  It was excellent.  The garlic knots were also amazing.  Wet with garlic butter!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhClUJCvrRL__ng_kCGGQNr8&fid=0x0:0xad63a7908a34c8ef"],"When":"2026-3-4"},{"Name":"Tiffany Hong-Cohen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVCeBft0uQ0oik_vOVil-jfie3a1riP0oJHmFO2jwBvt-vLUIaSeQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"How can you go wrong with NYC pizza? Basically impossible. The margherita slice is excellent, with a chunky red sauce, I forgot to take pics because it was that good. The pepperoni slice was solid too, nice crispy bites. The dough is super light, which I loved.

The grandma slice, though… 👎 very soggy and not great. When we went around 7:30 there was a long line, but 30 minutes later it disappeared. Worth the wait, just be strategic with your slice choices. 🍕","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBDBoD-TG4vkcYIW_rPLS87&fid=0x0:0xad63a7908a34c8ef"],"When":"2025-12-21"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mitch W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEmlYqBbUiBdZe0XBBudm0H6zO0nHTsaynGy7-kor8n2n1Ta_g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Stopped by Joe’s Pizza while in NYC. It’s solid for one thing: cheap, classic New York slices. If you want a quick, no-frills cheese slice that won’t destroy your wallet, this is your spot. It’s fast, straightforward, and exactly what you’d expect from a busy counter service pizza place. Nothing fancy, no crazy toppings just a simple slice you can fold and eat on the go. That said, I wouldn’t call it life changing. It’s good for what it is: affordable pizza in a prime location. If you’re expecting some mind blowing culinary experience, this isn’t that. But if you just want a cheap slice that gets the job done, Joe’s works.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDeBiaLc6Clji2l3zdazK5a&fid=0x0:0x43b20488619b3f43"],"When":"2026-2-27"},{"Name":"Lulu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8bthnseQPVzS047r0uyEn-r8FuuYgAnhYbQ4u3EfwKiNUKUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Cash only, $5.50 for pepperoni slice and $4.50 for regular. Customer service is apathetic, no greetings. I did take out and they barely had the pizza in the oven for a minute before handing it to me. No napkins. The pizza is ok, not a bad pizza, nice cheese to sauce ratio. Sauce is slightly sweet and tangy. Good crust, it was a good pizza, just not $5.50/$4.50 worth in my opinion.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCApZnS7W-OM4dUhmRkyxwm&fid=0x0:0x43b20488619b3f43"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"AK S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3QvysCJin5Az6pewO3Y7RhinBlvelhigtKrCXhvVHCN4NQPd4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We wanted to try NYC style pizza and the reviews for Joe’s pizza were as outstanding. We reached the place and there we see a huge line to get the pizza by slice or whole pie.
We told ourselves that this is it. It shall be worth the wait.
It took about 30-40 minutes to get to order and get the pie.
It was okay not the best that we had. I didn’t understand how come it’s rated this high on Google.
Nothing bad about the pizza but nothing best either.
Just wanted to let people know if you are spending the 30-40 minutes in December cold to have this pie may be think about it. You shall get it when there is no line.
So the disappointment is less.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDIwAGUUriCSslibSS4AbRQ&fid=0x0:0x43b20488619b3f43"],"When":"2026-1-6"},{"Name":"Kelly Chan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJCDhjkSaTW1xDFzzsfQbCbieI2GAd7yQ52VXJpgSa5OHFWf6-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Food: 4 Stars
Service: 4 Stars
Ambience: 4 Stars
Value: 5 Stars
Sanitary: 4 Stars
Overall: 4.2 Stars

Note: CASH ONLY

Joe’s Pizza in NYC has been on my food bucket list for ages, and I finally made the stop. I still remember watching Worth It on BuzzFeed years ago when they crowned Joe’s as the “most worth it” pizza, so there was definitely some nostalgia walking through those doors.

I ordered the classic cheese slice — simple, timeless, and honestly the best way to judge a good pizzeria. It didn’t disappoint. The cheese was fresh and melty without being greasy, the sauce had that perfect tang, and the crust… chef’s kiss. It had just the right thickness with a crispy crunch that somehow still stayed soft inside. Exactly what you want from a New York slice.

In today’s economy, finding something tasty, reliable, and filling feels like a small win, and Joe’s definitely delivers on that comfort factor. It’s nothing overly fancy, but that’s the charm. It’s just solid, satisfying pizza that hits the spot.

Would I come back? Absolutely. It may not be life-changing, but it’s definitely a staple worth trying — especially if you grew up watching the same food videos that made Joe’s a must-visit in the first place.

xx kellychan360","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhATgAxyiyu4mzTZlVxf5yih&fid=0x0:0x43b20488619b3f43"],"When":"2025-11-24"},{"Name":"Abigail Huffman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwUezQJFzuM7HnRUeP3Q8cUsP-tVlDNCHoraTBvJCk8SiUSRN8_w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The pizza at Joe’s Pizza was very good, and the slices are huge! It was exactly what we were looking for.

We didn’t realize it was cash-only, but thankfully there’s an ATM right outside the shop, which made it easy. There wasn’t a line when we stopped in on February 16th, so it was a quick and convenient visit.

We chose this spot over John’s because we wanted to grab individual slices rather than order a whole pie. It was the perfect choice for a fast, no-fuss stop. There isn’t much seating, but we weren’t expecting there to be.

We would definitely go again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD7Z635zxHYJFK4i4FIMSX5&fid=0x0:0x43b20488619b3f43"],"When":"2026-2-23"},{"Name":"ElAttar Reviews","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVi88DIX-T0HWvH44uNSJRd89cyCFmhiq-d8HePnZ0oFwacjug=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"’ve been hunting for a REAL New York slice for weeks — not the overpriced tourist versions or the soggy cafeteria ones that taste like cardboard. Almost gave up…
until a local recommended Joe’s Pizza in Greenwich Village.

The moment I walked in, I knew something was different — the smell of real cheese, the thin crispy crust coming straight out of the oven, and slices cut confidently, not shyly.

I ordered a plain cheese slice — because if a place can’t nail the basics, nothing else matters.

First bite… and honestly?
THIS is the slice I’ve been looking for.
Crispy edge, airy crust, light tomato tang, and cheese that actually stretches — authentic, simple, perfect.

The staff worked fast even with a line out the door — and everyone inside looked like someone who knows pizza. No Instagram tourists — just locals and real NYC regulars.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5/5 — Worth every minute of the wait.
If you want to taste actual New York… not the fake version… start with a plain slice at Joe’s.
I stopped by Joe’s Pizza on one of those evenings when New York feels overwhelming — when the noise, the speed, and the rush make you forget to slow down.
And somehow… holding that simple slice in my hand brought me back to myself.

Crispy edge, warm cheese, thin New York crust — nothing fancy, just honest flavor.
It reminded me that sometimes the simplest things are the most comforting.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
A perfect NY slice — authentic, warm, and unforgettable.
Photo by ElAttar Reviews","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC2jtSiYuIxo474F5Mg7JUH&fid=0x0:0x43b20488619b3f43"],"When":"2025-11-29"},{"Name":"Frugal Cyclist","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5NDw-24s_KVtW0-9yKcF7Jx-PlYPFiNy2ADr_QJaTBxv77P9N=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"SENSATIONAL PIZZA 🥇🥇

Ran over quickly and grabbed a regular slice & mushroom slice to go. Not much of a wait for the winter season. But there is usually a line by the door.

Pizza done just right. Thin crust with a flavorful tomato sauce and cheese still oozing a bit. 👍👍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhABJEQ-nMZX_8lgrYA16uuT&fid=0x0:0x43b20488619b3f43"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"Josh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhhiPBmyOZy4msavB7t-J64_7V9uiTksPmi_rEgxWsbzoBvgDf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cash only!

I also noticed, If you give a tip the worker will often heat your slice before handing it over. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Aigerim K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLGct8NLfKZEINa8zrFq6ndmvzGSKLOljxKp6mIAH0GXkB3xg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"NY Pizza Suprema is one of those rare places that doesn’t just serve food — it serves memories. I still remember the first time I walked in, carried by the warm smell of fresh dough and melted cheese drifting out onto the street. It felt like stepping into a pocket of New York where time slows down just long enough for you to breathe.
I was tired that day — the kind of tired that settles deep in your bones after hours of rushing through the city. But the moment I stepped inside, something softened. The staff greeted me with that unmistakable New York mix of warmth and confidence, like they already knew I was about to have a great slice.
When I took my first bite, everything else faded away. The crust — perfectly crisp; the cheese — rich and comforting; the sauce — bright, warm, almost familiar. It tasted like care, like tradition, like someone put a little heart into it.
Sitting there with my slice, I felt a small moment of peace in a city that never stops moving. NY Pizza Suprema isn’t just a pizzeria — it’s a place where you feel grounded, welcomed, and reminded of how simple joys can turn a day around.
I’m genuinely grateful for every visit — for the flavor, the kindness, the feeling of home tucked inside a perfect New York slice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC_X-8uVvHdzPSlmci0KRq3&fid=0x0:0xfecb69a95e026dfb"],"When":"2025-12-5"},{"Name":"Landon Bellamy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVN-BBNsjdURFRY4miVsqleL_cuipj_aNsz1JdajpaGtTQgnuyU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was looking for some good New York pizza, and this place absolutely SLAPS! Very glad I found this place. There can be a long line, but it moves quickly. Also mind that seating can be limited and tables can be left dirty. However, everyone there was very friendly and had some nice accents.

Now onto the pizza itself: This is exactly what I’m looking for in New York. The dough was at a great texture, it can be greasy at times, but I absolutely love the sauce. Overall, I really enjoyed this place and would come back again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDLDzyyzn70Mpa6aIJngWqa&fid=0x0:0xfecb69a95e026dfb"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"The Hands On Workshop","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXrvu0tyEgh5J0uUM-KkoEsXRJ6bsGeKmycU_TZlUeflKoAUBBG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best Pizza when you get off the train at Madison Square garden!
Great crispy thin crust. Balance of sauce and cheese. We've tried almost every type over the past year. Hands down favorite spot for a quick slice before hitting the town.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDw8M8C9jdU4Jkijyme4Qvn&fid=0x0:0xfecb69a95e026dfb"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Stephen sC","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJkvaT1eylsGWFrULV4wUvuuH7boM8W3dr-1xwuvXDH2RKnNNs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Superb family owned pizza restaurant with excellent food at great prices. Handbags a slice and enjoy, its amazing.

Lots of different options and lots of classics.

A must do NY restaurant and a great place to grab a slice and a break.

Very close to madisson square garden if you are visiting there.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC_xmrs1DiXxcZO0lNTq3MA&fid=0x0:0xfecb69a95e026dfb"],"When":"2025-11-24"},{"Name":"Emily Boudreaux","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTv6fMbfA6JjIUwLP8HhZUyWjWHQiHStz_tDPgMOGoFHEpVw0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Amazing slice of pizza — truly a quintessential New York experience. The moment you walk in, you’re greeted by a lineup of pies like they’re auditioning for your stomach, and yes, you can even go wild and add extra cheese.

The slice itself? Chef’s kiss. Crispy, balanced, and just the right ratio of everything. Was it the best pizza I’ve had in my entire life? Honestly, no — Canadian pizza still has my heart (they flavor the crust at my go-to spot, and that’s hard to beat).

But this? This is officially the best slice I’ve had in the U.S.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBj3YCTFLdL8bHioOSl73TX&fid=0x0:0xfecb69a95e026dfb"],"When":"2025-11-14"},{"Name":"Medha Khatri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIo6IA6h09tkkn_wOiweBzDq1NJkY26_FK7C1RvRATK_4awwDs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lovely experience, great ambience and close to Flix bus stop. Lots of vegetarian and vegan options and really good ones too! The slice of the pizza is reallly filling and a great choice. Must have!
As they say, they only serve pizzas but are the best at this!
I liked the amount of veg options that you have.
Also have a bus in 40 mins so perfect spot to eat and wait!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDPh4ENQnkrTL6Q85eO15kW&fid=0x0:0xfecb69a95e026dfb"],"When":"2026-1-13"},{"Name":"Skylar Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLUdozkATY5LwoABZa8harv_fp5NoJ2flnFNJyHT7CLtlgKDqU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"A typical classic slice of NY pizza! Has the reheat flavor to it, sauce was very tomato forward, and honestly quite greasy. Overall basic, nothing crazy or worth extreme hype over. Pretty easy to get in and out of (on foot of course) and convenient. Prices are expensive depending what you get, however that’s typical for NY. We ordered a full pizza, but if wanting to try multiple pies or alone, by the slice may be smarter as they are large slices! Wouldn’t travel here only for the pizza, but would come by if I were in the area due to the convenience and speed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAu-4YXWXbiE-n8UEBZDrNI&fid=0x0:0xfecb69a95e026dfb"],"When":"2026-3-6"},{"Name":"Won Joon Yun","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKmg1gPNwS77EOyKbFLBC5Ah5xs-CQrCmRFxK3G3-pOlUWvoA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Suprema Pizza turned out to be a surprisingly great choice for my very first pizza in New York. Much better than expected, it set a strong first impression of New York–style pizza.

Prices vary by slice, but they’re around $7.75 each. The pizza follows an Italian-style approach with a thin crust that’s crispy on the outside and soft on the inside.

We ordered four slices in total: Suprema, Fig, Hot Buffalo, and Hot Honey, ranked in that order of preference.

The Suprema slice was the clear favorite. It’s a tomato-based pizza topped with vegetables, and the bell peppers were especially flavorful and memorable. The Fig slice was also delicious, with sweet fig jam complementing the cheese well, though the jam wasn’t spread evenly across the slice, which was a slight downside. The Hot Buffalo slice was spicy and savory, making it enjoyable, while the Hot Honey slice — topped with burrata and hot honey — lacked a strong impact compared to the others.

One thing to note: although they seem to normally accept cards, the card machine wasn’t working at the time, so they were only taking cash.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDmTxZOXPxprbyRX2X3viDj&fid=0x0:0xfecb69a95e026dfb"],"When":"2025-12-22"}]

[{"Name":"Wendeth R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhKpne4zj3ro2tXZ-wiVoX46cdkvxTfkvwv7LjtolQaIzVIdHC4A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A recommendation from the staff at our hearby hotel- and incredibly on point. We had slices of the buffalo, spinach, Hawaiian,  and Lasagna. I never knew pizza could melt in your mouth, but this sure did. The crust was perfectly crispy- not hard, toppings were portioned to allow the flavors to blend without losing any taste, or overwhelming any one flavor.
It's small, so i feel like we were lucky to get a seat, bc it was quite busy. The staff were super nice as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCgeLv6fM6P78S7nLMIgOf&fid=0x0:0x851202204ae1327f"],"When":"2026-2-28"},{"Name":"Sean Oliver","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWuJJi9SNj4RM73bCAP_izLXFs3Bu-NMgMYdlk2m13I-qS5deIcRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Working in the area, also on the prowl for a tasty meal at a reasonable price. Hard to find here in Midtown.. Cheese pizza, the crust was a bit floppy. Pepperoni pizza bomb. Crispy crust, just as a NYC slice should be ! Friendly smile. $9.80 for 2 slices. Will make this a regular spot, grab it to go, and eat outside.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhClixIIov69068tanrke4go&fid=0x0:0x851202204ae1327f"],"When":"2026-1-16"},{"Name":"Michael Carey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZlW-wN5e5v1JuicCfp72MpLtt4hdUqKQ4jE6G7kvzXrsb5n3R=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice spot, clean, welcoming and pizza was great.

We got 3 slices, 2 x chipotle chicken and 1 x margarita slice. Served hot and service was good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBXg203ROCWGg-LK2e-C6LY&fid=0x0:0x851202204ae1327f"],"When":"2026-1-11"},{"Name":"Kilgore Trout","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlg4ULxDbBbxHqozEIKAih1Lb3FCFHRQ7ZnZnZsZUFl4QLlTdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"unassuming hole in the wall pizzeria near Grand Central Terminal, 2 great sloces for $11, what's not to like?  easy to miss as it lacks the flashy lights one finds in the area","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC4sfQpWyzJDwh9Xlq704Z8&fid=0x0:0x851202204ae1327f"],"When":"2026-1-11"},{"Name":"Karina Loja","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDY75q8d3xELNCsFNnbg_szYKk-RuTKS_0UVZ8ndgScjQB7VkL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very nice restaurant, everyone is friendly and the pizza 🍕 delicious, greetings from Danbury CT ill bring my friends next time.🫰","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDak7gbNzUWGQ7WIRYY-HXg&fid=0x0:0x851202204ae1327f"],"When":"2025-10-9"},{"Name":"omg_its Kenny","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKOkKr66wa7fKoP4ErSbUNIVe7nxUYARgaDDeGsjlGGo0RK3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Uncle Paul’s Pizza is amazing! The slices are huge, the crust is perfect, and everything tastes super fresh. The staff is friendly and quick, even when it’s busy. Definitely one of the best spots for pizza in New York—highly recommend! 🍕","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBumt1ni9NImiAjSdnkQGwr&fid=0x0:0x851202204ae1327f"],"When":"2025-9-28"},{"Name":"Vanessa Ivelisse","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLyvCmiq_nXHY0_-G9ZmhYdV7b2XpINs75QmR2LUaXjgPBkvSar=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came from Connecticut with my family and was looking for a place to eat after long walks. Asked around for places to eat and no one would give me a good recommendation. Went on Google and UNCLE PAULS PIZZA was about 5mns away from us. Walked over and it was packed however it was soooo worth it. I know CT is #1 in Pizza lol (dont be mad 😛🤣🤣) but this small place is reeeally good. And the service was great. Employee's were all very nice and not rude like every other place I went to buy from << (not food wise)
Even tho it was packed we only waited about 3-4mns for our 1lg 1md pizzas. And let me tell you the Pizzas were soooo soo good.
They gave us free soda just because..
My husband was gonna pay for the sodas and they said "its on the house" . Idk why 🤷🏻‍♀️
We also had their cheese cake.
I recommend this place 💯👌🏼
(BY THE WAY I AM A PICKY EATER) That should tell you a lot. ❤️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paul Hart","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6ceIzxgYaDnvwObJJaCTDCi3ux_LFkE7j4yI7woifaj1NJrwMmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the few pizza by-the-slice options I found with a good size seating area. They warmed up my pizza in the pizza oven before giving it to me.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAswfqer1AuH3H-jzK_c19T&fid=0x0:0x851202204ae1327f"],"When":"2025-11-13"}]

[{"Name":"S Sen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMiAyvn7H01JV027JUzSZx3CwoCXuqTHSyu9NkmSgszvPWqudn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Fun, quintessential little Italy vibes of an established New York City restaurant. Great service, and menu is much brighter than just pizza. Braised beef braciole and short rib anglotti were favorites for our table.
Reservations took extensive planning and setting a timer at midnight to jump on it, but totally worth it. We went on a cold day where wait times were short, but I don’t think this is typical.
Waiter was particularly attentive to our food, allergies, and double checked with the kitchen on ingredients.
The menu is not overwhelming and there’s a focused list of desserts and beverages. The kind of place where options have been carefully honed over years of service.
We also tried the tie-dye and honey pie pizzas. Crust was exceptionally thin. This is what New York style pizza is traditionally known for. If this is your thing, you’ll love it. They have it down to a science.
A definite repeat. Would rate 7.5/10 for the pizza experience, but all else was a solid 9+.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCnErh55bY79YiKVAT97Pnr&fid=0x0:0xea0bcb0a8807f54c"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Prianna Patel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXfQT3BIBhhNRtuXgiNzBPuoaHcR8JZZBOENTk0bC3LOYVZtWiGg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The pizzas are absolutely delicious—perfectly crispy crust, flavorful sauce, and great quality toppings every time. Their drinks are just as impressive and pair perfectly with the food. The vibe is lively yet cozy. Always a go-to when I’m craving amazing pizza in the city! 🍕🍸","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBZi7Sa-BF7dExqCLBLrRGx&fid=0x0:0xea0bcb0a8807f54c"],"When":"2026-3-1"},{"Name":"Christine - Food & Travel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV5A4eCwbjHXK2lDFxB2JrDFXiOgrXUF3MPxi62ef1VzUUuLfc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It is a rustic yet homey restaurant serving traditional Italian fares. Their thin crust pizza is crispy and chewy, and pasta is fresh with rich garlic savory pasta sauce.  Their zappoli is perfectly fried crispy outside and doughy soft inside 🙂, and cocktails are delicious!  It is a popular go to place and is crowded. So, you should make a reservation to avoid the long wait","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA22XFnEXcElVo8Bc4HFig-&fid=0x0:0xea0bcb0a8807f54c"],"When":"2025-12-23"},{"Name":"Brooke Waller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJeGicuo7H0GQ_ANuSa3fWaAgDWxNjKOb4d2y6Yis2EbKMmejLm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow this meal was unreal. Everything hit the mark. No joke the pizza has me looking up Rubirosa sauce jars to order because the pizza was that good. Great arugula salad with the tastiest dressing and an absolutely delicious ravioli dish in the butter sauce. I don’t *want* to come back… I NEED to come back. ❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDRko3Nb762g_IiAbxF8ElE&fid=0x0:0xea0bcb0a8807f54c"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"Charlene Auriel Lim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIDpksFh2kf0axFGqtG0mVTUyhrUvQLxGkNLON_XBkQv9zNxvc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After months of trying to get a reservation (yes, it’s that hard), I finally decided to just try going without one. The wait was around 45 minutes but it was worth it because the food was great! I loved the half & half pizza (tie-dye and vodka) and the mini rice balls. Definitely a must try for thin crust, cheesy, NY-style pizza.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAL1W2yalrP_MQuC9dqdnkF&fid=0x0:0xea0bcb0a8807f54c"],"When":"2026-1-19"},{"Name":"Kenzie Winther","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXP913mNUmhjVmXClVMhSJGISuRQTWhIaRMVRA9aNRv1Bx3t-KnSg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"When in New York you have to get pizza right… well I think they need to clarify when they say that and tell you to get Rubirosa’s pizza. Came here on a recommendation, risked the long wait, and man was it worth it. We sat at the bar and were helped by Sergio! Ordered two pizzas. One was a traditional fresco. And the other a half and half gluten free with honey pie and tie dye. The gluten free was phenomenal. They don’t make their crust in house but it is from a local establishment. The vodka sauce on their tie dye is impeccable. I loved that the crust was crispy! I devoured it all. The half and half is the way to go!!! All of that said, when in New York get pizza. But make sure it is Rubirosa’s!!

Knocking it down and star because of cost- gluten free is smaller than non but still same cost if not more…","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAJ5LTh4qWrUZc4BHGWEEPm&fid=0x0:0xea0bcb0a8807f54c"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"Larissa Kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAPDZZcM_MyE6oX2gBjcz2P7_8LTSsp3uytxful7p6RZ9dZBIhAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came here with a group of coworkers (who are not gluten free) and was prepared to get a salad and was delighted when they shared an entire gluten free menu with me. Was able to their famous tie dye pizza as gluten free. It was incredible! You definitely need a reservation cause this place gets packed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBFnBo4k_eVp4CtKBV0ogH2&fid=0x0:0xea0bcb0a8807f54c"],"When":"2026-1-11"},{"Name":"Marilyn Villatoro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgz1pplYngG5JF6Swzcej3VRlh1ZkLsIccTila6CBrHLbn2Bs0Rw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Rubirosa is pure comfort, warmth, and excellence from start to finish.

From the moment we walked in, the ambiance wrapped us up like being in a beloved grandma’s house — cozy, inviting, nostalgic, and full of heart. It’s the kind of place that instantly makes you relax and feel taken care of.

The service was truly exceptional. Our server, Alyssa, was warm, attentive, and wonderful, but honestly the entire team went above and beyond. You can feel how much pride they take in what they do, and that energy carries through the whole experience.

And then… the food. Absolutely outstanding. We started with the fried calamari — perfectly crispy and flavorful. The Supreme pizza and Bianca pizza were both phenomenal, each bite better than the last. Even the bread was delicious (which says a lot). We finished with the tiramisu, which was rich, balanced, and the perfect ending.

The espresso martinis deserve their own mention — smooth, rich, perfectly balanced, and honestly some of the best I’ve had. The ideal complement to an already incredible meal.

But the moment that really sealed it? They brought out a mini pizza box filled with mini chocolate slices. Thoughtful, playful, and unforgettable.

Everything was truly delectable. Rubirosa is one of those rare places that gets everything right — atmosphere, service, drinks, and food. I will absolutely be coming back, even if it’s out of my way.

Highly, highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCuz07RpQlf0GINrGSkJGCl&fid=0x0:0xea0bcb0a8807f54c"],"When":"2026-1-7"}]

[{"Name":"Ash M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnDcbih4CAOEMJ14SU2herwJu9EfMAGVlaHSftCtDTIqmDrXM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A must-visit for anyone in NYC! Joe’s is a total institution and it’s easy to see why. Not only is it famous from the Tobey Maguire Spider-Man movie, but the history is real—established in 1975 by Joe Pozzuoli from Naples. The pizza is the quintessential New York street slice: thin, crispy, and perfectly balanced. I love that you can get a quick slice or a full pie, with plenty of vegetarian and non-veg options. It’s popular with tourists, but it still feels like the authentic spot native New Yorkers love.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAKM0hYZ47RqQWQ9p83Ke5T&fid=0x0:0x71a9aa955eb026c2"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Christopher Graham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTcMZjmjvnU_s81OM9ih2YpZOXHD0bBevqWWqBp6iupFHSqTqTEw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing pizza stopped in got cheese and pepperoni slices and was absolutely delicious, sauce was on point, cheese great quality and the dough had that crispy taste I desire in a slice... 8.4 rating from me worthy of a stop and visit if in the area for sure","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAjsfsjxyRPNfi_t0s6hkMv&fid=0x0:0x71a9aa955eb026c2"],"When":"2026-3-8"},{"Name":"Tayler Fisher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbgEmm6xIpRUZIuNBF8r0Nij04heQ00iVu_DPb3-igNZPe3w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food, service, atmosphere, and most importantly, the pizza was great! Thank you for your service! Came here on 10/19/25 and was not disappointed! Ordered one slice of cheese and one slice of pepperoni. And got a ginger ale soda! It was delicious and hit the spot! I love Joe’s pizza and have been to Joe’s Pizza on numerous occasions at their various different locations! ♥️🙏🍕my photos and video are attached that capture my great/positive experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCP8LH-ion5gX6lSBtcBNzq&fid=0x0:0x71a9aa955eb026c2"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Jason Wong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL4HLbReFEvC1F-lajFczns6EL6S6dYFKhI0phome49bDuZbp0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Classic NYC slice, but nothing to rave about. You can get a slice like this in many nyc pizzerias. Definitely over hyped and priced. Maybe celebrities and Spider-Man made this place famous? Credit accepted.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD9kNTJ08AbDMkfr1fdISlN&fid=0x0:0x71a9aa955eb026c2"],"When":"2026-3-7"},{"Name":"Darshan Baria","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXGp7xM9gcSuQUKLaX5VxMr4aWdxLG_JFrBTrZdd5fOn1TbSrhZxg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Joe’s Pizza is one of those classic New York spots that’s more about the experience than the pizza itself. Worth trying once if you’re visiting NYC, just to say you’ve had it.

A couple things to note: they only accept cash, so come prepared. The crust is airy and fluffy, which is nice, but overall the pizza felt mid and a bit underwhelming.

I tried both the margherita and pepperoni slices. The margherita was below average, and the pepperoni was just average. The sauce lacked depth compared to some of the truly amazing pizza spots New York has to offer.

Not bad, not great. More of a tourist staple than a must-return spot.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCZt-f7gGtc-wV-_KdaD8WM&fid=0x0:0x71a9aa955eb026c2"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"David Camargo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpcANeHhiXMo2tUIGakIOJJIoxcCBsDr0M45gguvQUnqYEsEcXfg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Decent pizza, but not the best NY-style. The line was surprisingly long given how close it is to Times Square, though it did move quickly. The pepperoni was pretty greasy and the supreme was just okay, but the Sicilian slice was definitely the standout.”","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDNcoxJtyAYDki057jNHtPu&fid=0x0:0x71a9aa955eb026c2"],"When":"2025-11-14"},{"Name":"Mark Browne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLAGgbAQE5RGO9THYZQIN8e9oDWgYJuX69jIaa1zDW_YcWDWw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jusy awesome pie / pizza the base is super crispy. Dont know how they do it on such a large pie. It tastes fresh. Pepproni full of fennel. Calabrese loveky fresh tomatoes..best pizza ever tasted. Theres tons of pizza food teucks now in the uk or pizza joints. This beats them all. Fast service! Small joints, simple menu make this an essential new york visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBF6npBxWfCzyjY-ihpwDvs&fid=0x0:0x71a9aa955eb026c2"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Harsh Champ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQcKK7MD3npaKpAUfS505zw0OyMO9GzSqEMKoFk7jHzv_trcv4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I had two slices of the veggie pizza. The place was very crowded, but it didn’t really live up to the hype. The taste was pretty normal — nothing extraordinary. I’d say it’s more of a one-time visit kind of place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAaI0pqkJOuV_EOkazVg93c&fid=0x0:0x71a9aa955eb026c2"],"When":"2026-3-4"}]

[{"Name":"Ariana González","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4EyJtLhvM1np_DXvsv5xBMCcpdJtIcW8zXShF7Go6FIA_mLM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"When a place says they’re “delivering happiness one slice at a time,” you hope it’s true and this spot absolutely lives up to it.

We ordered a slice of the Naughty Pie (spicy vodka sauce, pepperoni, ricotta, and hot honey), and let me just say… I went to heaven and came right back down just to grab another slice. The balance of spicy, creamy, and sweet was unreal. Every bite was fresh, flavorful, and perfectly crisp. It’s the kind of pizza that makes you pause mid-bite because it’s that good.

This is definitely more of a grab-your-slice-and-go kind of place. They do have a few high-top tables, but it gets crowded quickly because it’s so popular. That said, the line moves fast, so don’t let it scare you away.

Safe to say, this is officially on my must-go list. I’ll absolutely be checking out their San Diego location and any others I can find because I already know I’ll be dreaming about this pizza. 🍕","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAqigqB7qGRKogVZpjyNgaY&fid=0x0:0x3c39f655da433d9d"],"When":"2026-3-3"},{"Name":"bridlingtonengland75","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVi9HpKNzLGfz8yi1_kNMvfzsXff_8oFpw4ooLiVK6mo_xSdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pizza was slamming good with plenty of pepperoni and burned the top of my mouth. As it should. Well Worth the trip. What I really liked, as the original site of Ray’s pizza, the prices aren’t gougy and the staff totally unpretentious. This is a real pizza joint delivering delicious slices for their neighbors.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCPj-RxB6C5C5tnOoohttEj&fid=0x0:0x3c39f655da433d9d"],"When":"2026-2-22"},{"Name":"Jashan Singh Gill","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpAVU8DaZXSKkR-6T6wgjv6NEffMKiKHdhlea4xLA7ET96s2gn7g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tried the naughty pie slice and it was amazing!! The flavor and the crunch were perfect! Definitely different than a regular pepperoni pizza. Would highly recommend and would definitely come back. No inside seating available. There are a few standing tables outside the store but they may or may not be available immediately. Definitely try it fresh.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCxgZsOuW07neCxLuLczbFG&fid=0x0:0x3c39f655da433d9d"],"When":"2025-12-23"},{"Name":"William Cummings Jr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOl0NDppWOaFm1CmnRW40WTE4bnFJnTvlJIyeDIr7sCUKoSqWV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The pepperoni square pizza was as delicious as it looks, the service was ok but the gentleman that spoke to me was hard to understand. No bathrooms here for customers and you will most likely stand if you're eating inside which is a very small crowded area. I love those white & green checkered pizza boxes and the vibe in and around the Prince Street area. I would definitely go back! With a bathroom and a place to sit I would have gave 5 stars!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhABYfBf8j2jWIlMvSb_CjGh&fid=0x0:0x3c39f655da433d9d"],"When":"2025-11-27"},{"Name":"Paul Vaughton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIL60ba3J1smZP9xdsMudvLY08YczfVkh-LnEuwIVL-ztOKow=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to grab a slice. Quality pizza, quick, buzzing place. Small and busy but you have a standing area inside or standing tables outside.
The plain cheese pizza was a bit sloppy on top making it difficult to eat, but still had a crispy base and tasty.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA3mNBwXvMlT4XxN_pVrJqi&fid=0x0:0x3c39f655da433d9d"],"When":"2026-2-20"},{"Name":"Andreea Olariu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWggDDsh0MtBXSbm4tAAqAZ6XmXFP7xHICJqVmTfgUsP1snjLuReQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yummy pizza, so tasty and crunchy. The ingredients are good quality and the result is great.  Prices are ok, cheaper when paying cash and the service is fast. Really loved it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCUXFIH6c2GLH8FtWIutZvP&fid=0x0:0x3c39f655da433d9d"],"When":"2026-2-18"},{"Name":"Kimberly H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlGjfZgXPRS1ac0cIfCCqdC0-q2XH-9l6gIm7X9uh07Zx-AzuCMw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time here, in the heart of little Italy. The original to a chain of pizza places. I frequent the Los ANGELES location, and love their pizza. Quick service, same great taste and quality. Good prices and large portions. Highly recommend, and would definitely return! Friendly helpful staff. Clean areas to stand and enjoy your slices","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD0Scm-yIq9iJpbGMB_AHdw&fid=0x0:0x3c39f655da433d9d"],"When":"2025-9-14"},{"Name":"Tony","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW4Ct-F_nMczrHLwZXIQaiB6brAAchLeGCHm5vpVe7WIlO3KTgU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It’s become a very popular tourist attraction but the pizza is good.  A lot of variety to choose from. Quality slices. Very much fast paced New York vibes. Can get very busy with a line outside. Standing room only to eat if you get lucky and find a spot by the wall. My favorite is the Spicy Spring. I love anything with their pepperoni. Can be hard to hear inside with the music and everyone talking so pay close attention to when they call you up for your food. If you are not used to New York fast paced pizza spots I can see why some people might think it’s “rude” so please look at the menu before you go up and order because they are trying to keep the line moving.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBzkiuL0rpZTirNAODCE22N&fid=0x0:0x3c39f655da433d9d"],"When":"2025-12-30"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Salman Idrees","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkJS3OoULTq8yIIl2i8uUz1TNn5U6VNyc76e8mvDmA5NtW_yp3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just had to share my amazing experience at Joe’s Pizza — it truly exceeded all my expectations!

From the moment I walked in, the atmosphere was warm, lively, and welcoming. The staff greeted me with genuine smiles and were incredibly friendly and attentive throughout my visit. It’s clear they take pride not just in their food but in making customers feel valued and comfortable.

Now let’s talk about the pizza — absolutely phenomenal. The crust was perfectly crisp on the outside while staying soft and chewy inside. The sauce had that rich, balanced flavor that tastes fresh and homemade, and the cheese was melted to perfection with just the right stretch in every bite. Every slice was packed with flavor, and you can really tell they use high-quality ingredients.

Service was fast and efficient even though the place was busy, which says a lot about how well the team works together. The staff were patient, helpful with recommendations, and made the whole experience even better.

If you’re looking for authentic, delicious pizza served by a team that genuinely cares, Joe’s Pizza is a must-visit. I’ll definitely be coming back for more!

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Highly recommend","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhALR6baertsk3yQRxil84kM&fid=0x0:0x3b67a41175949f55"],"When":"2026-2-15"},{"Name":"Devesh sharma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVbpg4TZtbpf2Hk8EYjz7xhx7N29HlQ8Tz5wtorJtTo4RTj1bA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Joe’s Pizza (Broadway) is undeniably one of New York’s classic pizza institutions and often one of the first recommendations for anyone visiting the city. Whether you’re grabbing a quick slice or ordering a whole pie, it’s a convenient and iconic stop.

The prices remain reasonable, especially considering the location and popularity. However, be prepared for long queues—waiting times can easily range from 30 to 45 minutes, and sometimes even up to an hour. The line does move, but occasionally slower than expected.

Their classic cheese, Margherita, and pepperoni slices are the clear favorites—simple, well-executed, and consistently satisfying. Inside, you’ll also find plenty of photos featuring celebrities and famous visitors, which adds to the nostalgic charm and history of the place.

While there are certainly other pizza spots in New York that may offer more innovative or elevated flavors, Joe’s stands out for its legacy, convenience, and reliability. It’s less about being the absolute “best” and more about experiencing a true NYC staple.

Definitely worth adding to your to-do list when visiting New York—especially if you want a taste of pizza history.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAV5VemgBDGSxQsUQQSHsCN&fid=0x0:0x3b67a41175949f55"],"When":"2026-2-14"},{"Name":"William Pauley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-YFG85a2np0GAZraX01MAWT-ZvAoeiwDRysC-_3JGvihKdg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"FANTASTIC low cost pizza!!! This it's my one must hit place in new york and I'm so glad I did. The pizza is affordable and it's light, crispy and delicious. There is definitely a wait to get in, but it's all part of the New York experience!!! I will say that their deep dish pizza was not my favorite and I would not get that again. However, if I return to New York I would definitely, make it a point to go here again.  The staff is friendly and the amount of pizza that they turn out is unreal!!! There is limited seating, so don't be upset if you don't get a seat.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBlwFnQXhkuUg859LVzOMpc&fid=0x0:0x3b67a41175949f55"],"When":"2025-12-16"},{"Name":"Takahiro Koyama","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeREisAdftMhkVeTjGoyeP6PZQCCmZiq4dtoi8EV9AAZjLWaxT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A Simple but Outstanding Classic New York Slice.
One of NYC’s most popular pizza spots, known for its thin, crispy crust topped with rich tomato sauce and plenty of cheese. Slices start at around $4.50, making it an easy and satisfying choice.

Just steps from Times Square and open from morning until late night, it’s a perfect stop anytime you’re craving real New York pizza!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA3G1JKosAFYzMW2ElIXdPy&fid=0x0:0x3b67a41175949f55"],"When":"2026-2-2"},{"Name":"Kylie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1V_8ANoOKRB0EK_4qD6Y8LyE2VJm-0ePOvGnAPKvSX6dUIvQ5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was my first time in NYC and the pizza was FABULOUS! Our driver recommended this place and stopped here at 3am. I was surprised how crowded it was during that time but that goes to show how great the pizza is! They say the pizza is great in NJ and NY because of the water. Whatever the reason, I wasn’t disappointed! Definitely recommend!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAFfQFg0GURakOfadcmEKcm&fid=0x0:0x3b67a41175949f55"],"When":"2026-2-19"},{"Name":"Ronald Tan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhCMhqTO0xejMjhPWyQ7jIEbZyPCmm6QSCTWpb2hhxTyPLEtWU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Joe’s Pizza NYC truly delivers on what it’s famous for. The pizza was crisp, fresh, and full of flavour simple, classic, and done right. You can tell the quality is consistent and well-earned.

The only downside was the queue, which was quite long, and the atmosphere is understandably busy, so I’d rate it about 3 stars for ambience. That said, it’s all part of the authentic New York pizza experience.

Overall, it’s absolutely worth a visit for the pizza itself.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhACURifQOi-zYtogebdppnA&fid=0x0:0x3b67a41175949f55"],"When":"2025-12-26"},{"Name":"Siyar Akpinar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKwUxadEcbFlBVvRGmOHg39TxiylRienbGE6PsxwRDHZTTBVg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tried Joes yesterday before the Lakers - Nets game and it was so unreal one of the best Pizzas ive ever had it truly lived up to the hype and was definitely a hit. The ques speak for themselves, i enjoyed it so much that on my way back after the game I came back for another 3 slices highly recommend it, if you visit NYC this should definitely be on the top of your lists.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCpitLvIzoGafQH92wr4fFE&fid=0x0:0x3b67a41175949f55"],"When":"2026-2-4"},{"Name":"Belle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjdK6qVXj0_aUD9mNakiHYxl8gOmj954SQogLjxji3-l31j4cK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can see the hype around this place. I was really amazed by how they decorated the space and displayed photos with the owner and other celebrities. The pizza slice is just right for the price, the lineup was okay, and the staff were very friendly. Highly recommended for tourists!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD4KHFW0_H4SCq5R7uZyfdt&fid=0x0:0x3b67a41175949f55"],"When":"2026-1-28"}]

[{"Name":"Logan Moore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJaEJsPBBnREy-RaYYJxkjPLJlAWeDDY0BixilxHhocKVlifLE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really crisp crust, loaded with filling, clean, and the best in East Village!

This time I had their new flavor with fresh burrsta and arugula on top at the end sprinkled eight olive oil!

I love the pepperoni with pesto and lots of cheese! Heaven!

This place have tables and chairs and good pizza! One of the best in the city!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAmnN0o56daa5T4GGcpzabe&fid=0x0:0x4c931ed69ce7caab"],"When":"2025-12-10"},{"Name":"CAMI FILMS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdpaulIeE_0g6k_281HuBweKqdiC2Ws-8Rki0ox2WpcMdQ570=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the pesto and pepperoni pizza. It was very very good. I would recommend it. Pretty pricey though at $32. The garlic knots were good too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCjyAq35ZXvVUTKqiTY_xSh&fid=0x0:0x4c931ed69ce7caab"],"When":"2026-1-22"},{"Name":"Yusuf Ozmen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK5cnewvjJHbd0w1ITnv-w3pDJQEqCQWv1EijlhQO3OzB47cmg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the best pizza i’ve ever had. New york style perfectly, the crust is amazing, no flop, great flavors and the staff is very friendly. It’s also very clean and nice vibe overall.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCKKnjl7XqBCyPharomo-jO&fid=0x0:0x4c931ed69ce7caab"],"When":"2025-11-22"},{"Name":"Mike Reviewed It!","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXj5lH0x62ElvKwvT-J8OrMHdrzBaCodH6ykp6JQCDRtBuWzO8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Excellent Sicilian slices. Went for the two on the end. They looked the biggest. That’s what she said.
Came to us hot and ready to eat. I like the doughiness and sweet sauce. Not a lot of cheese but an appropriate amount.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDuPkGsC2uR1XaYySqhNxV-&fid=0x0:0x4c931ed69ce7caab"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Food of CT","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdND3uBUC8fi0kvMsTVgkUS_h9krgUdHKaAu4tZXZnxtdC__k=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fell in love with pesto pepperoni pizza because of this place! I was visiting NYC with a friend for the day, and Nuovo York was a great choice for lunch. The slices were HUGE and it was a great quality pie! I would absolutely come back next time we’re in the area to try more of their menu items. Everyone was friendly and it was a cozy space.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD1a0sxSAbqyN3-nbE_suVp&fid=0x0:0x4c931ed69ce7caab"],"When":"2025-10-15"},{"Name":"Giuseppe Cappelluti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzuBmZ7yeM6wkg8--Z0uoY3RXUUCVed87dUMyWAYBn4qbITkc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great pizza (even most Italians would like it. And Italians can be very picky about pizza) and fair prices.
For less than $10, I could have two slices of New York-style pizza and a coke in the heart of Manhattan!

Just a suggestion: please correct the name 😉 (in Italian, New York is “Nuova York”, rather than “Nuovo York”)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAsYmNJhxOiHLeWQCoWAvVH&fid=0x0:0x4c931ed69ce7caab"],"When":"2025-9-16"},{"Name":"Michaela Watkins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2eUWmubItGznRWYDRQIkF-iyflfl-d3MToXjtXFRSVFRytQBf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great pizza here!! Perfect new york style and they have sooo many options. The pesto pepperoni was amazing!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAn1y9Yj81m9BTq8BmDuCjr&fid=0x0:0x4c931ed69ce7caab"],"When":"2025-10-25"},{"Name":"Debisree Ray","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVly3UaAqbhde1dh3oiI3HmJuPjNU47WBorjJp1HF6jBbLpWi5u=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I happened to come across this little pizza spot while passing by and decided to stop in since I was hungry. It’s a classic New York–style place—nothing fancy, just straightforward and inviting. I ordered a slice of pepperoni pizza with a bottle of water. The seating is limited and it was nearly full, but I managed to grab a table.

The pizza itself was exactly what you’d expect from a New York slice: thin crust, crispy, with just the right amount of cheese and flavorful pepperoni. It was inexpensive, filling, fresh, and honestly one slice was just enough for me.

If you’re in the area, it’s definitely worth checking out. They offer plenty of options beyond pepperoni, including square slices and other varieties to try.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQfdOgthpXWC9ucK44E7BS&fid=0x0:0x4c931ed69ce7caab"],"When":"2025-9-1"}]
