[{"Name":"Jeff","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIBEg9_A0Z-2kJbYAae1sIRYVxGU85ysAQ5mOCvpKk--50sgw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Food was not great. The Caprese salad was not salted, so it was difficult to appreciate umami flavor of the tomatoes. The buffalo milk mozzarella had a sour taste, and I suspect it has gone bad, though our server explained it is supposed to have a tang. The basil leaves were added on top as a decorative bunch and not torn, so there was no basil flavor in the salad. Arugula seemed out of place in a Caprese.

The octopus in tomato sauce with capers and olives was flavorful, though it had a fishy smell and may not be the most fresh.

The two pizzas had large black burnt areas  that were bitter.

The fancy-looking olive oil on the table smells like paint thinner.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCGDpK0RYcMwdtpFrccQy92&fid=0x0:0x694ff9c48d50f83"],"When":"2025-11-17"},{"Name":"Jiao Zhang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWWZgXKgY9rTF-k4cpXNOSYH-6BPvbB7sGe4T2t9i1lWrgweym6=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Finally find some authentic Napoli pizza in the city. It brings me back to Italy and London when good pizza is served hot and fresh. Definitely recommend it if you are a big fan of thin pizza.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDnDeP2eMYJQszQIzcggyzR&fid=0x0:0x694ff9c48d50f83"],"When":"2026-1-23"},{"Name":"Bill","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXsOJBegc_oRnySqPjFfmGgqBwX-E_Cxwmk15KuBwL4bnBBTkM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A bustling spot for Neapolitan style pizza with energetic service and a huge menu that offers tons of options. We tried four pizzas: a calzone, a pistachio pizza, a truffle pizza, and a burrata pizza. The truffle pizza was the standout with its rich, umami flavor, and the burrata pizza was also very enjoyable, even if a bit tricky to share. The pistachio and calzone were decent, just not as memorable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAf4XwkDXQTWIFrk4AuK81H&fid=0x0:0x694ff9c48d50f83"],"When":"2025-12-6"},{"Name":"Javier Kohen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpx_naboFyS9hPV2vugnqK3-l4129suf5aMbaPbgYVN0P1ZJku=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great Neapolitan pizza and the gnocchi were also really good. The ambiance isn't bad, but the side is very tight so people bump into your table and chair, and it's very loud.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDfYdOarOQCM88KHaI2eACY&fid=0x0:0x694ff9c48d50f83"],"When":"2025-12-19"},{"Name":"Tommy Marongiu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLx8pG47Yrtje5dmjSt9mGCoQjl_Tje76_7iN1ibFBhwfOo0lsL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"When we ask for the bill and waiting someone to take the payment, the guy ( I believe was the owner’s son ) he came at the table clapping hands like are you paying and give me the table back or what? So disrespectful. Pizza was amazing","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDD1A6aGrps0_gO-Ytfugq8&fid=0x0:0x694ff9c48d50f83"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"Tim Hewitt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZvoq-1KtCu9SZ9Tk4OPMd8yEsidnb5z_1-9aB2s8x3Q8Z4Bv3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The pizza was ok and fairly reasonably priced, the Maradonia everything is an eye sore and the wait staff acted like they didn’t really care much that we were there - even though the place was almost entirely empty. I was contemplating getting an appetizer or a pasta, but the prices screamed quality and I wasn’t sure I could trust that they would be.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBIk1APYfi3-FFLuh20WwSK&fid=0x0:0x694ff9c48d50f83"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Max NoName","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX16XvN_xshPYv8au51HAGHc5gOrNzG-0lpJpXqy5CK3A7BQn8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I tried Song’ E Napule in Manhattan, an authentic Neapolitan pizzeria. The pizza was tasty, juicy, and beautifully packed with nice presentation. However, I felt the price was a little on the high side. The sauce had a slightly sour note and the dough was a bit plain, so for me it didn’t reach a perfect 5 out of 5. Overall, I’d give it a solid 4+, though personally I still prefer SIMO’ Pizza for now.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAupgAVfnYUtZnTXB-NnyMS&fid=0x0:0x694ff9c48d50f83"],"When":"2025-8-23"},{"Name":"Francisco Gonzalez Rey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgADEoun6uZusinU_1X9kHRXMiQRZejwZ4e01HnbeUtJbhs1x9jQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best pizzas we’ve ever had — if not the best.
The dough had the perfect thickness, and the cheese was absolutely delicious — truly unmatched.

We tried the Margherita and the truffle pizza. The truffle one was next-level — simply outstanding.

The service was exceptional. They even offered us complimentary Aperol Spritz, which was a lovely touch.
The whole place has a great vibe — it genuinely feels like a little slice of Italy","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBm5OhU7xTFCBmP9u824B6o&fid=0x0:0x694ff9c48d50f83"],"When":"2025-7-4"}]

[{"Name":"Latin Impulse Magazine","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvYv9Od5XPklkRRVie1QggSNvKQuo_3h4SnFR015-2IeRQSA6h5w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Feb 19,2026, went to try their Roman-Style pizza since I was in the area prior to attending the Winter Film Festival and to my surprise was not impressed at all. I had like a veg Roman-Style pizza and the sauce was tasteless. Will not be back. The garlic square bread was not properly seasoned .Feb 19,2026, went to try their pizza since I was in the area prior to attending the Winter Film Festival and to my surprise was not impressed at all. I had like a veg Sicilian pizza and the sauce was tasteless. Will not be back. The garlic square bread was not properly seasoned . Also there is no seating and very narrow as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDYPFSx6ohACsUYDlSmdEnS&fid=0x0:0x20b5aafa4eea78c3"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"Matt Goldstein","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQ4Eyy4C-vA5CJqdhtfrc1kIRd44TYCve7JzzJCTm03mUdWX0N=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Searching Google for pizza places in this are, Unregular stood out as unique.  That's why I wanted to try it.  I didn't realize they had no seating - disappointing - but we were only stopping for a quick bite before going to Regal Cinema.  I got the 3 mushroom, and a slice of pepperoni.  They were both excellent.  My wife got a grandma slice.  Getting a free drink (3 or more slices) was an unexpected bonus.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAJ5pEgtXapGtw1iwuFqLVK&fid=0x0:0x20b5aafa4eea78c3"],"When":"2026-2-11"},{"Name":"nisha sridhar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXmEKrU0Va8vL_lB2gCnTZ6cK5hCA_R4DvBj3kKMxPZrTHKKSohTg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For me personally this was the best pizza I've tried so far in NYC.
